name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for GRU953-Studio
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like GRU953-Studio to do that it doesn't today?**

**What problem would this solve for you?**

**Note on new specialist roles:** this project deliberately keeps its
agent-role count small and bounded — a request to add a whole new role
needs to name a specific, real gap an existing role can't cover, not just
"this would be nice." Feature requests that extend an existing role's
behaviour are usually a better fit than a new role.
